title: GMS Week 13 - RE-ARRANGING!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 04/04/2022
Image reference: 2022-04-04_gms-week-13-re-arranging_img1.jpg
Both Pakistani and (especially) Indian markets have come surging back this week, to lead the way over a lackluster Bangladesh that has virtually dropped out of contention of late. Firming steel plate prices in India have been the key driving factor behind this, and it still seems inevitable that the USD 700/LDT mark could be breached into these two markets, on upcoming sales in the near future (as long as these fundamentals hold). Pakistan has been on the sidelines of late, but appear to have woken up this week, in the face of some serious and sustained competition from a resurgent India and a Bangladeshi market that's begun to slip in the rankings.
